response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content. 00:00-02:04 is intro/background; 02:05-02:58 is story narration; 02:59-04:58 is vocal song performance. 2. Identified the song as 'Anagura Gurashi' by Kikuo via on-screen credits. 3. Used web search to obtain the full original Japanese lyrics and English translation. 4. Constructed the JSON object according to the specified schema.
response.global_summary: This video features Ouro Kronii, a virtual streamer, performing a cover of the song "Anagura Gurashi" (Hole Dwelling), originally by the Vocaloid producer Kikuo. The video begins with an introductory graphic and a narrated story set in a fantasy realm, followed by the vocal performance.

scenes.description: Introductory image displaying 'Fall in Grace' and 'Ouro Kronii Birthday Live 2020'. Instrumental music plays.
Narrated story sequence with an illustrated background. No vocal music.
Ouro Kronii performs 'Anagura Gurashi'. The screen displays lyrics throughout the performance.
